title: Isoloma warszewiczii
taxonomy: Isoloma warszewiczii is classified within the family Hymenophyllaceae, which is a group of small, delicate ferns commonly known as the 'filmy ferns'. This family is part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. Isoloma warszewiczii is further classified within the genus Isoloma, which is a monotypic genus containing only one species. The classification of Isoloma warszewiczii is based on its unique characteristics and morphological features. It is considered a member of the vascular plant kingdom, which also includes seed plants and other ferns.
